memoryArtifacts.headline: Story from FindAGrave.com
memoryArtifacts.description:
Sir Ralph Shelton was the son of Sir Ralph Shelton and Ann Burgulion.
He married Alice Uvedale

When he was 2 years old, he inherited Great Snoring and Thirsford co Norfolk from his kinsman Hugh De Bu …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph De Shelton IV於1361年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可雪登時，他的父親Ralph De Shelton III46歲，母親Anne De Burgullion37歲。他於大約1373年與Alice De Uvedale在英國德比夏爾蒙亞申結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1424年4月25日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可格亞特 斯諾林享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可格亞特 斯諾林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph De Shelton IV于1361年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可雪登时，他的父亲Ralph De Shelton III46岁，母亲Anne De Burgullion37岁。他于大约1373年与Alice De Uvedale在英国德比夏爾蒙亞申结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1424年4月25日在英国英格兰諾福爾可格亞特 斯諾林享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可格亞特 斯諾林。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Shelton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): habitational name primarily from Shelton (Nottinghamshire), but also from Shelton (Bedfordshire, Norfolk, Shropshire, and Staffordshire). The placenames all derive from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph De Shelton IV was born in 1361, in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph De Shelton III, was 46 and his mother, Anne De Burgullion, was 37. He married Alice De Uvedale about 1373, in Monyash, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 25 April 1424, in Great Snoring, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Great Snoring, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph De Shelton IV est né en 1361, à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph De Shelton III, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Anne De Burgullion, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Alice De Uvedale environ 1373, à Monyash, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 avril 1424, à Great Snoring, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Great Snoring, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Great Snoring, Norfolk, England: Great Snoring, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph De Shelton IV 1361 in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph De Shelton III 46 und seine Mutter Anne De Burgullion 37. Er hat um 1373 in Monyash, Derbyshire, England Alice De Uvedale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. April 1424 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Great Snoring, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Great Snoring, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Alice De Uvedale circa 1373, nel Monyash, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 aprile 1424, nel Great Snoring, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Great Snoring, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph De Shelton IVが1361年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクシェルトンで生まれた時，父Ralph De Shelton IIIは46歳，母Anne De Burgullionは37歳であった。約1373年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアモニーアッシュでAlice De Uvedaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1424年4月25日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクグレアト スノーイングで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクグレアト スノーイングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph De Shelton IV(이)가 1361년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 셸턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph De Shelton III(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne De Burgullion(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1373년 영국 더비실르 몬야시에서 Alice De Uvedale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1424년 4월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 그리트 스노링에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 그리트 스노링에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph De Shelton IV nasceu em 1361, em Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph De Shelton III, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Anne De Burgullion, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice De Uvedale aproximadamente 1373, em Monyash, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de abril de 1424, em Great Snoring, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Great Snoring, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph De Shelton IV родился в 1361 г. в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph De Shelton III было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne De Burgullion, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice De Uvedale около 1373 г. в местности моняш, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 25 апреля 1424 г. в местности грит сноринг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности грит сноринг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph De Shelton IV nació en 1361, en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph De Shelton III, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Anne De Burgullion, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Alice De Uvedale aproximadamente 1373, en Monyash, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de abril de 1424, en Great Snoring, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Great Snoring, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
